comment.text: Sub-section title in the security settings that labels the configuration for the default type of sharing links.

usage.context:
<Text
 fontSize="14px"
 fontWeight="700"
 className={styles.subSectionTitle}
 >
 {t("Settings:DefaultSharingLinkType")}
 </Text>
 <div
 className={`category-item-description ${styles.sharingLinkDescription}`}
 >
 <Text fontSize="13px" fontWeight="400">
